revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:Separated entries|main|separator={{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{comma|}}}|{{{comma}}}|, }}|conjunction={{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{and|}}}|{{{and}}}| and }}}}{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{after|}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Restored revision 1319477852 by [[Special:Contributions/Zackmann08|Zackmann08]] ([[User talk:Zackmann08|talk]]): Turn dataPlural on. Fixed [[Template:Needs IPA]] to not call this template, but the underlying module directly
revision.text: <includeonly>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:Separated entries|main|dataPlural=1|separator={{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{comma|}}}|{{{comma}}}|, }}|conjunction={{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{and|}}}|{{{and}}}| and }}}}{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{after|}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Enum here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
